title: WOLVERINE: UNBOUNDED — Layer 1 Critic Pre-Build
summary: Layer 1 architecture critic review. All Layer 1 MDs (wfreqs.md, wfarch.md, wfdep.graph.md, wfmod.dep.md, wf_file_manifest.md) reviewed against wolf.beastprompt.md original vision. File manifest tallied: L1_MANIFEST_COUNT = 214 files. Architecture fulfills original vision with minor discrepancies noted. Key HR compliance verified at design level.

discrepancy_notice.summary_claim: 238 total files (54 headers + 54 sources + 101 content + 29 other)
discrepancy_notice.discrepancy: 14 files unaccounted for in summary table
discrepancy_notice.resolution: Use actual tally (214) for planning. Summary table corrected.

HR-01.requirement: CLAWS DEPLOY IN FIRST 10 SECONDS OF GAMEPLAY. Tutorial does not exist.
architecture_verification: Critical path: 18 files to CLAWS IN GAME milestone

HR-02.requirement: DAMAGE MODEL IS REAL-TIME ON CHARACTER MESH. Not a texture swap. Actual mesh deformation for major wounds.
architecture_verification: WolverineWoundSystemComponent — Mesh deformation via morph targets
Nanite conflict resolved: Logan uses non-Nanite skeletal mesh (wfarch.md Section 9.1)

HR-03.requirement: NO LOADING SCREENS WITHIN THE CITY. District transitions seamless.
architecture_verification: DistrictStreamingVolume — Trigger volume for seamless transitions
3 districts (Basin, Midtown, Ridge) defined in EDistrictType

HR-04.requirement: RAGE CANNOT BE MANUALLY ACTIVATED. It is earned through damage taken. Never a button press.
architecture_verification: TEST-03 automation test explicitly verifies HR-04 compliance

HR-05.requirement: ENVIRONMENTAL DESTRUCTION IS PERSISTENT. Destroyed objects do not respawn. Ever.
architecture_verification: EnvironmentalDestructible — Chaos destruction with GUID assignment
NFR-06: Persistent destruction state survives save/load cycle

HR-06.requirement: CLAW MATERIAL SYSTEM HAS MINIMUM 6 MATERIAL TYPES. Flesh, bone, light metal, heavy metal, concrete, glass.
architecture_verification: EClawMaterialType enum has exactly 6 values: Flesh, Bone, LightMetal, HeavyMetal, Concrete, Glass

HR-07.requirement: PREDATOR MODE IS ALWAYS OPTIONAL. Every stealth section has a loud solution.
architecture_verification: WolverineMovementComponent — Both stealth (ClawBrake, WallClimb) and loud (ClawSprint, ClawLunge) options
WeaponXSoldier — AI responds to both stealth and loud approaches
FearStateMachine — Fear escalation from both stealth takedowns and combat
No architecture locks player into stealth-only or combat-only

HR-08.requirement: NO SKILL TREES. NO UPGRADE MENUS. Progression is entirely through the Trauma System.
architecture_verification: FMemoryFragment::MechanicalBonus — Direct mechanical improvement (not skill points)
WolverinePlayerState — NO XP, NO level, NO skill points properties
TEST-08 automation test greps UMG for XP, Experience, Level, SkillPoint, SkillTree

nanite_mesh_deformation_hr02.resolution: Logan character uses non-Nanite skeletal mesh with morph targets for wound deformation. World geometry uses Nanite for density without LOD pop.
rationale: Trade-off is acceptable (single character vs. world density)
Morph targets + skeleton-driven deformation is UE5-standard
Decal overlays supplement visual damage

persistent_destruction_level_streaming_h.resolution: UDestructionPersistenceData is saved to player save game, loaded on district entry, applied via level instance references (GUID-based).
rationale: GUID-based tracking is robust
O(1) lookup on load (indexed by GUID)
Survives save/load cycle per NFR-06

motion_matching_claw_integration.resolution: Dual motion matching databases (Retracted/Deployed). Runtime blend based on ClawComponent state. Transition clips for deploy/retract mid-motion.
rationale: 52 animation clips defined (wfarch.md Section 7.2)
2x animation data cost is acceptable (traversal is core pillar)
WolverineAnimationInstance::ClawBlendWeight handles blending

rage_event_driven_enforcement_hr04.resolution: WolverineRageComponent has NO public ActivateRage(). AddRage() is internal, called only by OnDamageDealt/OnDamageReceived events.
rationale: Compile-time enforcement (no BlueprintCallable on AddRage)
Event-driven architecture is clean
TEST-03 explicitly verifies compliance

cycle_detection.result: Checked Dependencies: 47 nodes, 89 edges. Cycles Detected: 0. VERDICT: Graph is a DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph)
rationale: Topological sort is deterministic
UBT build order is well-defined

critical_path.path: WolverineCoreTypes → IWolverineMaterialResponse → MaterialResponseSystem → ClawComponent → MovementComponent → WolverineCharacter → Playable

rationale: Build order respects dependencies
Critical path (L0-L3) is minimal for first milestone

hr_test_mapping.coverage: Wound application, healing tick, mesh deformation
NO XP/levels in TraumaSystem or UMG

rationale: 8 tests map to 8 HR requirements
HR-04 and HR-08 have explicit compliance tests

file_count_discrepancy.issue: Summary claims 238 files, actual tally is 214 files.
file_count_discrepancy.impact: Planning may be off by 14 files (~6% variance).
file_count_discrepancy.resolution: Use actual tally (L1_MANIFEST_COUNT = 214) for planning. Correct summary table in wf_file_manifest.md before Layer 2.

woundsystem_tick_rate.impact: Healing visual may appear slightly choppy during fast combat.
woundsystem_tick_rate.resolution: Documented as performance optimization (wfarch.md). Acceptable trade-off for NFR-01 (60fps target). Monitor in playtest.

animation_clip_count.issue: 52 animation clips defined, but wfarch.md Section 7.2 says ~50 minimum.
animation_clip_count.impact: Slight over-scope, but within acceptable variance.

architecture_quality_rationale: All 8 HR requirements satisfied at design level
Dependency graph is a DAG (0 cycles)
Automation tests cover all HR requirements
file_manifest_quality_rationale: Critical path is minimal and achievable
technical_resolutions_rationale: Motion Matching + claw integration is feasible

final_decision_rationale: Architecture fulfills original vision from wolf.beastprompt.md
All 8 HR requirements satisfied at design level
Automation tests cover all HR requirements
Minor issues noted (file count discrepancy, tick rate) do not block Layer 2 execution

architecture_vs_original_vision.question: Does this architecture fulfill the original vision from wolf.beastprompt.md?
architecture_vs_original_vision.answer: YES — with high fidelity. The architecture captures all core pillars.

vision_pillars.pillar: Pillar 3: City Is Alive And Destructible

missing_incomplete_elements.layer2_resolution: RESOLVED — HR-01 enforced via DeployClaws() <200ms, input bound to Q in DefaultInput.ini. No tutorial system exists per design. Opening = first 10 seconds of gameplay.

RESOLVED — FMemoryFragment struct fully defined with MemoryID, Title, Duration, MechanicalBonus, BonusValue, BlueprintData. 10 data assets specified in wf_file_manifest.md (T190-T199). Content creation is Layer 3.
RESOLVED — FIntelItem struct fully defined with IntelID, Title, Description, AudioLog, IsCollected. 15 data assets specified in wf_file_manifest.md (T200-T214). Content creation is Layer 3.
RESOLVED — ASafeHouse class defined with SafeHouseID (1-4), JournalEntry (FText), OnEnterSafeHouse delegate. Journal content is narrative design (Layer 3). System architecture complete.

architecture_vs_original_vision.assessment: All gaps are Layer 3 content creation tasks. Architecture provides complete systems.

approved_status_validity.question: Is the APPROVED state on this wfcritic_prebuild.md file valid?

evaluation_criteria.criterion: All 8 HRs verified at design level

rationale: All 8 Hard Requirements from wolf.beastprompt.md are satisfied at the architecture design level.
The dependency graph (wfdep.graph.md) is a verified DAG with 0 cycles.
The module dependencies (wfmod.dep.md) produce a deterministic UBT build order.
The file manifest (wf_file_manifest.md) accounts for all 214 files across 6 build levels.
Automation tests (8 total) explicitly verify each HR requirement.
Technical conflicts (Nanite/mesh deform, destruction persistence, motion matching, rage enforcement) are documented with valid resolutions.
Minor issues (file count discrepancy, 10Hz wound tick) are noted but do not block Layer 2.
caveats: APPROVED is at design level only — implementation may reveal issues.
Layer 2 critic_prebuild2.md must re-verify HR compliance at code level.
Content data assets (memories, intel, journal entries) are Layer 3 creation tasks — architecture is complete.
